overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing the protagonist walking through a desolate, foggy mountain valley at night. The character carries a large cargo backpack through rocky terrain with sparse vegetation, transitioning from an open valley into a narrow canyon with vertical timefall rain streaks visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain valley with rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the open valley carrying a large cargo backpack, navigating around rocks and sparse vegetation

entered.detail: large dark rocky mountains forming the left boundary of the valley
large dark rocky mountains forming the right boundary of the valley
mountain peaks visible in the distant background
small patches of vegetation scattered across the sandy ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide, open mountain valley at night. Rocky mountain ranges frame the left, right, and center background while sparse bushes dot the sandy ground. The atmosphere is hazy and desolate with low visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon with timefall rain

events.description: vertical timefall rain streaks become visible falling from the sky in the distance
distant light source becomes visible on the right side of the canyon

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward through the narrowing canyon toward the tall spire formation, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: steep rocky canyon wall forming the left boundary of the narrow passage
steep rocky canyon wall forming the right boundary of the narrow passage
distinctive tall pointed rock spire rising prominently in the center distance
vertical streaks of luminous rain falling from the overcast sky
small bright light source visible in the distance on the right canyon wall

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions into a narrow, enclosed canyon with steep rock walls on both sides. Vertical streaks of timefall rain become visible falling from the sky, and a distinctive tall spire formation dominates the center view. A distant light glow appears on the right side as the character continues walking deeper into the canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate mountain valley at night, maintaining a mood of isolation amidst a hazy landscape. It begins with the character traversing a wide, open expanse of sandy ground, where sparse bushes dot the terrain. As the camera moves forward, the view is framed by towering, rocky mountain ranges that loom in the left, right, and center background. The scene remains shrouded in a thick, atmospheric haze that limits visibility, emphasizing the vast and empty nature of the wilderness.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as an open landscape tightens into a claustrophobic, rain-swept canyon. It begins with the environment narrowing into a deep gorge defined by steep, imposing rock walls on both sides. As the camera pushes deeper into the enclosure, vertical streaks of timefall rain emerge from the sky, framing a distinctive tall spire formation that dominates the center of the view. The scene then shifts toward a distant, mysterious glow appearing on the right side, drawing the character further into the depths of the rocky corridor.
